daily.description: Analyzes activity patterns to identify optimal times for scheduled maintenance tasks.
daily.title: Maintenance Window

daily.description: Finds when important knowledge is shared in the transcript and suggests what should be written down. Output is a Markdown list of documentation opportunities with time ranges and destinations.
daily.title: Documentation Moments

daily.description: Reviews the day's transcript to capture each significant file or attachment that was opened, saved or shared. Generates a Markdown timeline with context about how the file was used.
daily.title: File Interactions

daily.description: Summarizes the overall flow of the workday. Looks for patterns in focus, energy, context switching and highlights productivity insights in a Markdown report.
daily.title: Day Overview

daily.description: Extracts people, projects, tools and other entities from the transcript and maps how they relate. Produces a Markdown report plus narrative describing network hubs and bridges discovered during the day.
daily.title: Knowledge Graph

daily.description: Identifies when videos, articles, music or social content are consumed. Classifies each instance as work or personal and reports the source in chronological sections.
daily.title: Media Consumption

daily.description: Scans conversations and tasks for sparks of new ideas, problem statements and potential ventures. Outputs a list of the most promising opportunities with context and suggested next steps.
daily.title: Innovation Opportunities

daily.description: Highlights moments where additional information would help progress work. Produces a list of targeted research tasks with time ranges and context.
daily.title: Research Needs

daily.description: Identifies all future calendar events and scheduled activities noted in transcripts. Extracts dates, times, participants, and event details for anything scheduled beyond today.
daily.title: Upcoming Schedule

daily.description: Constructs a detailed chronological timeline documenting every activity, task shift, and event throughout the workday. Creates a comprehensive historical record with rich descriptions of what happened when.
daily.title: Day Timeline

daily.description: Catalogues every application or service used throughout the day and how long it was active. The report details which tools are critical, supporting or distracting.
daily.title: Tool Usage

segment.description: Detects completed activities across all facets and writes records with synthesized descriptions
segment.title: Activity Records

segment.description: Synthesizes segment activity from screenshots and audio, focusing on observable changes and searchability.
segment.title: Activity Synthesis

segment.description: Detects configured activities present in segment and tracks state across segments
segment.title: Activity State

segment.description: Extracts people, companies, projects, and tools from segment content
segment.title: Entity Extraction

segment.description: Classifies segment activity into relevant facets based on other segment outputs
segment.title: Facet Classification

segment.description: Creates a detailed documentary record of screen activity. Focuses on the 'what' - chronological account with preserved details, excerpts, and entities.
segment.title: Screen Record

segment.description: Detects meetings in the segment and extracts participant names from screen and conversation.
segment.title: Meeting Speakers
